race.comment: UNSTOPABULL (9) misses the kick almost like clockwork but has been finishing his races off well. Caught the eye in the closing stages again last start over 1250m at this track. One for thrill-seekers only but if he gets things right he can definitely take this out. WRITTEN SCANDAL (8) came with a well-timed run to collect a BM64 at the provincials recently when second-up from a spell. Has raced well here before so this isn't out of reach. MOTHER GOOSE (3) returned to form last start when runner-up over 1250m here, finishing just ahead of UNSTOPABULL. Open to further improvement at the fourth run of the prep. CLEAR PROOF (7) ran a cheeky race here a fortnight ago and is cherry ripe after two runs back. WATSON (2) is the class runner back from a 20-week spell. Two recent trails should have him ready to run well.
